pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will target Java 17 instead of 21, failing to utilize new language features or meeting JDK 21 compliance requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+ compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 21 may trigger deprecation warnings or fail if strict release compliance is enforced; release is the standard for modern JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add release configuration to the test compiler plugin to ensure tests are compiled against the target Java version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Tests might be compiled with default or mismatched source levels if not explicitly configured, leading to runtime incompatibilities with Java 21 features.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct semantic marking of serialization metadata.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, causing a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile with --enable-preview or strict linting rules enabled in modern toolchains targeting Java 21.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is part of java.io in Java 21; without the import, the code will not compile.
